chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Line item
triplets.object: Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each; Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50

triplets.subject: Return Policy
triplets.object: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund

triplets.subject: CUSTOMER_MASTER
triplets.object: Master record for all registered platform customers.

triplets.subject: TB_PRODUCT
triplets.object: Master catalogue of all products available for sale.

triplets.subject: SALES_ORDER_HDR
triplets.object: Header record for each customer sales order.

triplets.subject: ORDER_LINE_ITEM
triplets.object: Individual product lines within a sales order.

entities_post_resolution.name: Category
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Category entity representing a taxonomy category with a unique identifier (primary key) and a human-readable display name.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO | | **Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment) | | CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Customer is an individual or entity registered on the platform who makes purchases and may receive refunds for order issues or cancellations.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login) | **Key Attributes**:
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | **Key Attributes**:
- Geographic region for tax calculation | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status | **Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active | **Business Rules**:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | **Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | **Definition**: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products. | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Customer | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is

entities_post_resolution.name: Delivered At
entities_post_resolution.definition: The date and time when the order was delivered to the customer.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | DELIVERED_AT | DATETIME | Delivery timestamp | YES | | | SHIPPED_AT | DATETIME | Ship timestamp | YES |

entities_post_resolution.name: Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line item is a single, product-specific entry on a sales order that records the quantity and unit price (historical) for that product and computes the extended amount, with each line item referencing exactly one product.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | **Examples**:
- Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each
- Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50 | **Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: Sales Order is a formal business document recording a customer's request to purchase products, identified by a unique ORDER_ID and dated by ORDER_DATE.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Payment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer)
- Payment amount
- Confirmation timestamp
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Shipment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Source Warehouse
- Destination Customer Address
- Shipped timestamp
- Tracking number
- Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A S

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: An Order Line Item is a single line item in a sales order representing a product or service with quantity and price.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | **Business Rules**:
- Cannot be shipped until payment is confirmed | **Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order. | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sal

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Payment represents a monetary transaction that settles a Sales Order, identified by a unique Payment ID, associated with exactly one Sales Order, and capturing payment method, amount, timestamp, and status; a Sales Order may have multiple Payments.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Payment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer)
- Payment amount
- Confirmation timestamp
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | **Business Rules**:
- Payment must be confirmed before order ships | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Product Display Name
entities_post_resolution.definition: Product name refers to the human-readable display name of a product, used for identification and display in user-facing contexts.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO | | **Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment) | | PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO | | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | **Key Attributes**:
- Human-readable product name

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A shipment is a unique record that tracks the movement of goods for a single sales order from a source warehouse to a destination address, including shipment ID, timestamps, tracking number, and status.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Shipment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Source Warehouse
- Destination Customer Address
- Shipped timestamp
- Tracking number
- Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | **Business Rules**:
- Can only be created for confirmed orders with payment | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

entities_post_resolution.name: Unit Price
entities_post_resolution.definition: The monetary amount charged per unit of a product in a transaction (unit price), typically captured for a line item and may reflect the price at the time of the order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

entities_post_resolution.name: Unique Customer Identifier
entities_post_resolution.definition: A column value that uniquely identifies a customer in the database.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CUST_ID | INT | Unique customer identifier | NO | | | PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Is Active
entities_post_resolution.definition: A boolean indicator that specifies whether an entity is currently active and available (true) or inactive/not available.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether customer can place orders | NO | | | IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether currently for sale | NO | | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status

entities_post_resolution.name: Refund
entities_post_resolution.definition: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled or a product is returned under a stated policy.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled. | Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

entities_post_resolution.name: 7 Years After
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase

entities_post_resolution.name: Account Creation Timestamp
entities_post_resolution.definition: | CREATED_AT | DATETIME | Account creation timestamp | NO |
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | CREATED_AT | DATETIME | Account creation timestamp | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Created At
entities_post_resolution.definition: | CREATED_AT | DATETIME | Account creation timestamp | NO | | | CREATED_AT | DATETIME | Order creation timestamp | NO |
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | CREATED_AT | DATETIME | Account creation timestamp | NO | | | CREATED_AT | DATETIME | Order creation timestamp | NO |

entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Payment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer)
- Payment amount
- Confirmation timestamp
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Shipment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Source Warehouse
- Destination Customer Address
- Shipped timestamp
- Tracking number
- Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category
entities_post_resolution.definition:
TB_CATEGORY
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Hierarchical product category tree. | **Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment) | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Hierarchical product category tree. | **Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment) | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Product
entities_post_resolution.definition:
TB_PRODUCT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master catalogue of all products available for sale. | **Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Purchase
entities_post_resolution.definition: **Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

entities_post_resolution.name: Tangible Or Digital Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: **Definition**: A tangible or digital item offered for sale on the platform.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Definition**: A tangible or digital item offered for sale on the platform.

- Must belong to a valid category before being sold

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core information about customers including identification, contact details, regional grouping, account creation timestamp, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about products, including identifiers, names, category association, pricing, and active status for catalog and sales use.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores hierarchical category data for products, including each category's name and a reference to its parent category.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores metadata for customer sales orders, including identifiers, order timing, total amount, status, and timestamps for payment confirmation, delivery, and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores details of individual line items for each order, including product, quantity, unit price, and line total amount.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments associated with customer orders, including the payment method, amount, status, and timestamps for confirmation and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of shipments associated with orders, including warehouse, shipment timestamp, tracking details, and shipment status.
